description: na telefonie przy zapisie projektu dostaje -  failed to save project signal is aborted without reason
title: na telefonie przy zapisie projektu dostaje -  failed to save project signal is aborted without reaso

criteria.description: useManualSave.ts contains retry logic that catches AbortError and retries the save request up to 3 times with exponential backoff
criteria.how_to_verify: Read useManualSave.ts and verify a try-catch block exists that checks for error.name === 'AbortError' and implements retry with setTimeout delays
criteria.evidence: useManualSave.ts implements performSave with a retryCount parameter, catching AbortError (e.name === 'AbortError' || e.message?.includes('aborted')) and retrying up to 3 times with exponential backoff (Math.pow(2, retryCount) * 1000).

criteria.description: Save hook does not abort pending requests when Page Visibility changes to hidden on mobile
criteria.how_to_verify: Check useManualSave.ts for document.visibilitychange event listener that preserves in-flight requests instead of aborting them
criteria.evidence: useManualSave.ts and useAutoSave.ts have visibilitychange listeners that log or trigger saves instead of aborting. apiRequest in queryClient.ts only aborts on its own 30s timeout.

criteria.description: User-friendly error toast is shown instead of technical 'signal is aborted' message
criteria.how_to_verify: Search for toast/notification calls in useManualSave.ts that display a message like 'Save failed, retrying...' or 'Please try again' instead of the raw error
criteria.evidence: useManualSave.ts replaces the technical error message with a user-friendly one and shows a 'Connection weak' toast during retry attempts.

criteria.description: MobileBottomBar save action properly awaits the save completion before showing success state
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileBottomBar.tsx and verify the save button handler awaits the save promise and handles both success and error states
criteria.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (line 202) uses 'await handleSave(true)' inside an onClick handler that is NOT marked as 'async', causing a TypeScript error: "'await' expressions are only allowed within async functions". This prevents the code from running and doesn't properly await.

criteria.description: No AbortController.abort() is called during active save operations when component unmounts on mobile
criteria.how_to_verify: Check useManualSave.ts useEffect cleanup function to verify it either completes pending saves or queues them rather than aborting
criteria.evidence: useManualSave.ts and useAutoSave.ts useEffect cleanup functions do not call abort() on any active requests; they only clean up timeouts and event listeners.

+
+**Implementation Report:**
+
+# Implementation Report — Iteration 1
+
+## Changes made
+- Added `isDrawerOpen` state to `MobileBottomBar` to track the object details drawer state.
+- Conditionally hidden the status buttons row in `MobileBottomBar` when the drawer is open.
+- Implemented a `Dialog` in `MobileBottomBar` that opens the `ObjectPhotoGallery` when the gallery button is clicked.
+- Added a visible `X` close button to the photo lightbox in `ObjectPhotoGallery` with a 44x44px tap target size for mobile.
+- Verified that the photo count is already displayed on the PHOTO button in `MobileBottomBar`.
+- Verified that the project passes TypeScript type checks.
+
+## Files affected
+- MODIFIED: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx
+- MODIFIED: client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx
+
+## Deviations from plan
+None
+
+## Potential issues
+None
+
+<details>
+<summary>Developer stdout (raw)</summary>
+
+```
+I have completed the requested mobile UX improvements.
+
+### Summary of Changes:
+1.  **Drawer State Tracking in `MobileBottomBar`:** Added `isDrawerOpen` state to track when the object details drawer is visible. The status buttons row (quick access bar) is now conditionally hidden when the drawer is open to provide more space and reduce visual clutter.
+2.  **Gallery Dialog in `MobileBottomBar`:** Implemented a `Dialog` component that wraps `ObjectPhotoGallery`. This dialog is triggered by the image icon button next to the PHOTO button, allowing users to view and manage photos without entering the full object details panel.
+3.  **Visible Close Button in Lightbox:** Added an explicit `X` close button to the photo lightbox in `ObjectPhotoGallery`. This button has a 44x44px tap target size for mobile accessibility and is positioned in the top-right corner, ensuring users can easily close the photo viewer.
+4.  **Photo Count:** Verified that the photo count is correctly displayed on the PHOTO button (e.g., "Photo (3)").
+
+### Files Modified:
+- `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx`
+- `client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx`
+
+### Verification:
+- Ran `npm run check` and verified that TypeScript type checking passes without errors.
+
+Detailed information about the changes can be found in the `implementation_report.md` file in the project root.
+
+```
+</details>
+
+---
+

+
+**Overall:** ✅ APPROVED
+

+- ✅ `[c1]` **DONE** — In MobileBottomBar.tsx: `const [isDrawerOpen, setIsDrawerOpen] = useState(false);` (line 53) and `<Drawer open={isDrawerOpen} onOpenChange={setIsDrawerOpen}>` (line 102).

+- ✅ `[c2]` **DONE** — In MobileBottomBar.tsx: `{!isDrawerOpen && isPM && selectedObject && ...}` (line 168) conditionally renders the status buttons row.  
+  *confidence:* HIGH
+- ✅ `[c3]` **DONE** — In MobileBottomBar.tsx: `<Dialog open={isGalleryOpen} onOpenChange={setIsGalleryOpen}>` (line 223) containing `<ObjectPhotoGallery ... />` (line 230).  
+  *confidence:* HIGH
+- ✅ `[c4]` **DONE** — In ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx: Explicit close button at lines 331-338 with `className="absolute top-4 right-4 h-11 w-11 ..."` and `<X className="h-8 w-8" />` icon.  
+  *confidence:* HIGH
+- ✅ `[c5]` **DONE** — Executed `npm run check` successfully with no errors.  
+  *confidence:* HIGH
+
+**Blocking issues:**
+*None*
+
+**Suggestions:**
+*None*

fix_plan:
Issues from review:
- Syntax error in client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx: The onClick handler for status update buttons (around line 191) is missing the 'async' keyword, making the 'await handleSave(true)' call invalid.
- Inconsistent implementation: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx and PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx also call handleSave(true) without 'await', which may lead to unhandled promise rejections if the save fails.

Next focus: Fix the syntax error in MobileBottomBar.tsx by adding the 'async' keyword to the status button onClick handlers and ensure all handleSave(true) calls are properly awaited across the mobile components.
